Clean & Tranquil Environment

Our Story

A Calm Space, An Artful Touch

West U Nails & Facial was built around one idea: every visit should feel like a retreat. Our artists — including Mai, Tina, MiMi, and Betty — bring years of precision and genuine warmth to every service.

From show-stopping acrylics to the most relaxing pedicure you've ever had (yes, clients have fallen asleep), we obsess over the details so you can let go completely.

4.9

600+

Happy Reviews

Gel Longevity

What We Offer

Services Crafted for You

✎

Gel Manicure

Long-lasting color and shine with zero chipping. Clients report a full month of flawless wear.

From $35
✿

Acrylic Full Set

Custom shapes, ombré, and hand-painted designs. Bring your Pinterest inspo — we'll exceed it.

From $45
⚛

Luxury Pedicure

Hot stone massage, heated neck pad, and a leg/foot treatment that melts stress on contact.

From $40
✨

Nail Art & Design

From Mardi Gras to holiday glam — intricate freehand artistry tailored to your vision.

From $10+
♨

Signature Facial

Deep cleansing, exfoliation, steam, extraction, and a finishing mask. Betty's specialty — skin leaves feeling silk.

From $55
✧

Gel-X Extensions

Full-coverage soft gel tips for length and strength without damage. Beautiful and lasting.

From $55
